name: tiny-editor
desc: TinyEditor is a rich text editor based on Quill 2.0, which extends rich modules and formats on the basis of Quill. It is powerful and out-of-the-box. TinyEdito…
descFull: TinyEditor is a rich text editor based on Quill 2.0, which extends rich modules and formats on the basis of Quill. It is powerful and out-of-the-box. TinyEditor 是一个基于 Quill 2.0 的富文本编辑器，在 Quill 基础上扩展了丰富的模块和格式，功能强大、开箱即用。
